# Introduction to Multiple Linear Regression {multiple-regression}

```{r multiple-regression-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/multiple-regression-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/multiple-regression/"
)
```

```{r child-multiple-regression, child="../lecture-content/09-multiple-regression.Rmd"}
```
